/home/davidmalone/conda_envs/cmake-env/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fmessage-length=0 -march=nocona -mtune=haswell -ftree-vectorize -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -fno-plt -O2 -ffunction-sections -pipe -isystem /home/davidmalone/conda_envs/cmake-env/include -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/davidmalone/conda_envs/cmake-env/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/davidmalone/conda_envs/cmake-env/lib -L/home/davidmalone/conda_envs/cmake-env/lib -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MyAssignment.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MyAssignment.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyAssignment.dir/matrix.cpp.o -o MyAssignment  /home/davidmalone/conda_envs/cmake-env/lib/libboost_program_options.so.1.85.0 -fopenmp
